seoTitle: Lake Macfarlane vs Lake Torrens — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lake Macfarlane and Lake Torrens. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lake Macfarlane vs Lake Torrens: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lake Macfarlane and Lake Torrens.
heading: Lake Macfarlane vs Lake Torrens — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Macfarlane, South Australia and Lake Torrens, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Macfarlane has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Lake Torrens (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Macfarlane or Lake Torrens safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Macfarlane has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Lake Torrens scores 54/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Macfarlane scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Torrens scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Macfarlane or Lake Torrens?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Macfarlane has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
